title: Amtech G0995 600mm (24") Decorator's edge
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: This 600mm (24") decorator's edge has a lightweight high impact plastic handle and a durable steel rule with both imperial and metric measurements
VERSATILE: The all-purpose trimming edge ensures straight edges when cutting wallcoverings and wallpapering
SIZE CAPACITY: 24 inch / 60 cm / 600 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Decorators edge See more
